_meta.description: Active signal board — unread/open signals only. All roles read this single file and filter by their 'to' field.
_meta.protocol: When you complete a task: update status to 'done' and run: node scripts/signal-done.js <signal-id>. To send a new signal: node scripts/signal-send.js

signals.message: MediaPipe integration deployed to production (commit b56564b). All health checks pass (/, /library, /arcade, /foundation — all 200). This replaces GPT-4o Vision with client-side MediaPipe for all recording flows. Zero AI API cost for Arcade + Micro scoring. Standing by for M21-M25 BE completion signals.

MediaPipe integration deployed to https://seeneyu.vercel.app. All 3 recording flows now use client-side MediaPipe instead of GPT-4o Vision: (1) Arcade /arcade/[bundleId] — 10s challenge, score screen; (2) Micro-Practice /library/[clipId]/practice — per-step feedback; (3) Full Performance /library/[clipId]/record — full coaching feedback. All routes returning 200. Please smoke-test camera + scoring flows.

MediaPipe integration ready for testing. All 3 flows updated: (1) Arcade /arcade/[bundleId] — 10s challenge, score screen, no API errors; (2) Micro-Practice /library/[clipId]/practice — per-step feedback; (3) Full Performance /library/[clipId]/record — full coaching feedback. All work with OPENAI_API_KEY unset. Check browser console for MediaPipe model loading.

MediaPipe integration complete. Replaced GPT-4o Vision with client-side MediaPipe (FaceLandmarker + PoseLandmarker) for all 3 recording flows: Arcade, Micro-Practice, Full Performance. Zero AI API dependency for Arcade + Micro scoring. Full Performance uses optional GPT-4o TEXT with template fallback. 0 TS errors.

M17–M20 deployed to https://seeneyu.vercel.app. YOUTUBE_API_KEY confirmed in Vercel. DB schema pushed (ArcadeBundle, ArcadeChallenge, ArcadeAttempt + screenplayText). 30 arcade challenges seeded. All routes returning 200.

Routes to smoke-test:
- / (homepage — new hero, Mission, Team, Testimonials, Footer)
- /library (search bar, collapsible filters, 4-col grid)
- /arcade (3 bundles visible)
- /arcade/[bundleId] (camera + 10s timer + scoring)
- /admin/import (ZIP upload page — admin only)
- /admin/clips/[id]/edit (Crawl Screenplay button)

Build: 0 TS errors, 31 static + dynamic pages generated.

M17–M20 code complete and ready for review after Builder deploys.

- Task B: crawl-jobs run route returns 400 for config errors (YOUTUBE_API_KEY missing)
- Task C: jszip installed, zip-importer.ts, POST /admin/import-zip, /admin/import page (drag-drop), admin sidebar Import link

## NEEDS from Builder
1. npx prisma db push (ArcadeBundle/Challenge/Attempt + screenplayText on Clip)
2. npx prisma generate
3. npm run db:seed (arcade challenges)
4. npm install (jszip added)
5. vercel --prod --yes

All specs include: full Tailwind classes, React state approach, responsive behavior, component interfaces, file list. Backend Engineer can implement immediately.

You are the Marketer for seeneyu. Your first priority is producing the full VC fundraising package: (1) Brand Brief, (2) VC Pitch Deck as PPTX, (3) One-pager executive summary, (4) VC outreach email templates, (5) Demo script. M19 + M20 data delivered this session.

## M19 — Arcade Challenge Seed Data
File: .shared/outputs/data/arcade-challenges-seed.json
- 3 bundles × 10 challenges = 30 challenges total
- Bundle 0: Confidence & Authority (intermediate) — Gladiator, Wall Street, Social Network, Any Given Sunday, A Few Good Men, Network, Margin Call, Catch Me If You Can, Coach Carter, King's Speech
- Bundle 1: Empathy & Warmth (beginner) — Jerry Maguire, Good Will Hunting, Dead Poets Society, Pursuit of Happyness, Before Sunrise, Forrest Gump, When Harry Met Sally, Rain Man, Good Will Hunting
- Bundle 2: Tension & Conflict (advanced) — Whiplash, Silence of the Lambs, Inglourious Basterds, No Country for Old Men, 12 Angry Men, Glengarry Glen Ross, Dark Knight, Shawshank, A Few Good Men, Lincoln
- Mix: 15 facial + 15 gesture challenges
- referenceImageUrl = null (MVP description-only scoring per spec)
- All descriptions drawn from library films

## M20 — Screenplay Source Audit
File: .shared/outputs/data/m20-screenplay-audit.json
- 65 clips audited
- 53 have screenplay sources (all imsdb.com)
- 12 have null sources (Iron Man 2, The Intern, There Will Be Blood, Marriage Story, Frost/Nixon + partial clips whose film is covered by other clips)
- Primary selector: td.scrtext pre
- CRITICAL FINDINGS for Backend Engineer:
  - 2 URL encoding issues: King's Speech (raw apostrophe vs %27) and Schindler's List (needs %27)
  - 12 Angry Men uses 'Twelve-Angry-Men.html' slug (not '12-Angry-Men')
  - Caching by film = 32 unique HTTP requests max (not 53)
  - Recommended: 500ms delay between requests, cheerio for parsing

Ready for Backend Engineer to implement screenplay-crawler.ts.

BUG-004 fixed. LibraryFilters.tsx film row now: desktop shows first 8 tags collapsed + '+ N more ▾' toggle pill that expands to all; mobile renders a native <select> dropdown (no pills on mobile). No Designer spec was available yet but PM signal had complete requirements — implemented per those. Ready for Tester verification.

BUG-004 design spec delivered.

Artifact: .shared/outputs/design/bug-004-film-filter-fix.md

Spec covers:
- Desktop collapsed state (6 tags default + '+ N more ▾' amber pill)
- Desktop expanded state (all tags + 'Show fewer ▴' pill)
- Mobile <select> dropdown (hidden md:flex / block md:hidden pattern)
- Exact Tailwind classes for all elements
- React state approach (filmExpanded useState)
- Edge case: active film beyond position 6 always injected into visible set
- No animation library needed — React state toggle is instant and clean

Backend Engineer notified. Implementation can begin immediately.

UPCOMING: M16 â€” Learning Materials Builder review will arrive after Backend Engineer completes implementation.

## What to test when the review-request arrives

### Job Creation
1. /admin/crawl-jobs â€” job list loads, 'New Job' button visible
2. /admin/crawl-jobs/new â€” form submits successfully: name, skill/technique, keywords, difficulty, max results
3. Created job appears in list with status 'pending'

### Job Execution
4. 'Run Job' triggers execution â€” status cycles: pending â†’ running â†’ complete
5. Results populate after completion (verify at least 1 result from YouTube)
6. Each result card shows: thumbnail, title, channel name, relevance score (0-10), AI analysis snippet
7. If YOUTUBE_API_KEY is missing from env: graceful error message, not a crash

### Results Review
8. Default sort: highest relevance score first
9. Filter tabs (All / Pending / Approved / Rejected) toggle correctly
10. Thumbnail click opens YouTube embed inline

### Approve Flow
11. Approve button opens modal with pre-filled clip metadata form
12. Submit metadata â†’ success toast â†’ Clip record created in DB
13. Approved clip appears at /library (verify it shows in the grid)
14. Approved clip's detail page shows 'How It Works' tab (observation guide auto-generated)
15. Result shows 'Approved' status badge after approval

### Reject Flow
16. Reject button â†’ result immediately shows 'Rejected' status (optimistic UI)
17. Rejected results visible under Rejected filter

### Special Tactics
18. Create job with custom technique name (e.g. 'Triangle Gaze') â€” no errors, job executes
19. Communication tactics from taxonomy appear in the technique selector

### Edge Cases
20. Gibberish keywords â†’ 'No results found' shown gracefully (not crash)
21. Running a completed job again â†’ should not duplicate existing results
22. Non-admin user cannot access /admin/crawl-jobs (redirects to sign-in)

Status: PENDING â€” wait for Backend Engineer's review-request signal before starting.

NEW MILESTONE TO DOCUMENT: M16 — Learning Materials Builder.

When approved by Tester, log in activity-log.md:

## What to document
- New admin-only section at /admin/crawl-jobs
- What a crawl job is: admin defines skill/technique + keywords → system searches YouTube → AI scores each result for relevance → admin approves/rejects
- New Prisma models: CrawlJob, CrawlResult
- New services: youtube-crawler.ts (YouTube Data API v3), clip-relevance-scorer.ts (GPT-4o relevance scoring)
- Approve flow: creates Clip + auto-generates ObservationGuide + PracticeSteps
- Special tactics system: 40+ named communication techniques beyond 5 standard categories (from communication-tactics.json)
- New env var required: YOUTUBE_API_KEY

## Strategic significance
This milestone shifts seeneyu from manual content curation to semi-automated content discovery. Admin can now target highly specific communication skills (Power Pause, Triangle Gaze, Proxemic Management, etc.) not covered in standard clip categories.
